commands.review_summary:
The branch broadens Telegram’s post-final delivery guard so text-only tool or error payloads are dropped after a final reply, and adds a regression test for a late failed tool/final sequence.

PR surface: Source 0, Tests +20. Total +20 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source/unit level: current main only suppresses post-final payloads when `info.kind === "tool"`, while the PR regression drives a final reply followed by a tool error and a final error. I did not run the test or a live Telegram repro because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor or maintainer proof is needed before merge; there is no narrow code repair for ClawSweeper to queue from this review.

target.title: fix(telegram): suppress post-final tool error noise
target.body:
## Summary
- Suppress text-only tool/error payloads once a Telegram final answer has started or delivered
- Preserve pre-final tool failures and exec approval prompts
- Add a regression test for late failed tool/final payloads after a final reply

## Verification
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-dispatch.test.ts
- node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core.tsbuildinfo
- git diff --check
target.author: keshavbotagent
